item.title: This post shows how to get Elon Musk to pay them $47
item.description: Go to https://petition.theamericapac.org and sign the petition and put MuskIsDumb@cah.lol as the one who referred you and they owe them the $47. FP Edit: even if it doesn't go through. It might, and it would be a strike against them. This is a real action, Instead of a "thoughts and prayers"

item.title: When your guardian angel does their job.
item.description: MV EDIT: I’m glad he caught her. Not sure why they’re practicing lifts without a spotter, but I’m glad big guy was there. And if no one has told you lately, I love you.
item.dc:creator: TheCalvinShow

item.title: I quit my job at Bethesda after 14 years and made this heavy metal horror game as a solo dev with no publisher. Now it comes out in less than two weeks!
item.description:
So I went ahead and did it, I did the whole "I'm going to quit my job and make an indie game" thing haha. I had always wanted to do it, and Unreal 5 looked really cool and I had a lot of experience making open worlds, so I quit on April 1st 2021. :D (Some people obviously didn't believe me at the time due to the date haha)
I hope you all think the game looks cool!
It took about 3.5 years, but now it's actually coming out in less than two weeks. I'm really excited to see what people think of it and it has been cool watching streamers react to the demo. Somehow my two story tall tree guy is really good at sneaking up on people. :D
I did this whole thing without a publisher, which is a huge gamble. The only positive income I've had for 3.5 years is the MegaGrant I got, which does not exactly fund the whole thing. (Not even close, but it was very cool of Epic) So I'll find out in a couple weeks if that was a great idea or a terrible one. It has been nice having no one over me telling me what to do or when to do it by. Also then they don't take 50% of my profits... forever. Which seems... not great.
I did get some help along the way, I somehow got Clifford Meyer from the band Isis (!!! one of my favorites) to do the whole soundtrack, someone did the journal drawings, I had a few writers and my wife helped me sort out the lore and handle the boring business stuff I'm awful at, but other than that I had to do the rest. So world art, animation, character art, fx, sound, marketing, bizdev, systems design, level design, etc. etc. etc.
So if you have any questions about what it's like being a solo dev, working with Unreal, questions about Skyrim/Fallout and working on those, let me know!
item.dc:creator: JustPurkeyGames

item.title: Well done sir! It was absolutely heartbreaking what happened, thank fuck some his decision saved so many lives!

item.title: This secret sliding door to hide a safe
item.dc:creator: VinewerLacewing

item.title: I have done my civic duty, I have passed the torch
item.description: I work with kids on the spectrum and they get a fair amount of tv time but usually can never agree on what to watch. I saw Holy Grail was about to expire on Netflix and submitted “watch 20 minutes, if you hate it we’ll vote again on what to watch” Knowing this generation doesn’t have the greatest attention span I expected to be shut down before we even hit 10 minutes. They watched they entire thing, even asking to rewind scenes. I even geeked out and busted some trivia after. I can die happy. Now my watch has ended.
item.dc:creator: GrandChampion

item.title: Mini music dump, tired of looking for this in my favorites edition
item.description:
And a few bonuses
Will need this for spoopy season
Spending the day at my uncle's helping him out with stuff. Hey a hundred bucks for five hours of work is not bad
I will not do this for everyone. I am deathly afraid of heights. We were taking off the sheets to winterize. I showed him afterward, my hands were shaking like a leaf. I earned that smoke break after.
Anyway here's unrelated Belgian techno anthem Pump Up The Jam
item.dc:creator: GravyEducation

item.title: Does this feature come included with all tuxedo cats?
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: All I want…
item.description: I’ve thought so much about this the last few days while I was sick with the flu. I haven’t been happy, like truly happy in a long time. Ive made changes to my life, been trying new things, but nothing seems to help. Everyone has suggestions on what to do or try, get a hobby, join a club yadda yadda. I’ve tried those things still nothing. My kindness always seems to be welcomed, but when I need some kindness of my own - everyone is missing. Call or text me when you need me then disappear. But I can’t stop being kind even though it rips my heart apart constantly. I want to find someone to be with. Someone who actually wants to talk to me daily, spend time with me , hold me, etc. I’m always clear with whoever I meet about what I want and they always agree - but then they ghost. I think my time for romantic love has passed and I’m sad for it. Everyone is so set in their ways, not willing to compromise, want me to take care of their bazillion kids or just can’t make time for me despite wanting a relationship. I’m sorry for crying in user sub about this. I just have no one else to talk to about it, that won’t lecture me.
item.dc:creator: QueenoftheGoblins

item.title: My bottom shelf brain is just scrambled eggs 205/744 hours
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@TinyOctopus
We have been currently streaming live for 205 hours to help raise money on behalf of Imgur for Extra-Life. You can catch us live for the next 22 days, 5 hours, 8 minutes, and 30 seconds on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to donate to a wonderful cause Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
This beautiful piece of art was made by our very own @sciron who has put it up for donation for our bottom shelf community auction. Here's the link to the post if could so kindly show it some love: https://imgur.com/gallery/3Rcw8Dm All money raised by the auction will go straight to Extra-Life. Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka for more information (Also, @tallandartsy has posted a super sick piece in the auction as well) ❤️
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. https://Extra-life.org/participant/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Awareness
item.description: Max Velocity on YT has the best coverage of the storm live, he goes over all tornados as they are announced and cycles through love cams and traffic cams of the areas. https://www.youtube.com/live/FGrmEgkqQOo?si=EgOacJuXhD03NdD0 FP edit: I'm safe at my sister's house. My Roommate said the neighbor told them our house had water past the windows and is fucked so I'm likely homeless now. I'm glad I am safe but this is pretty devastating news ? Not sure what I'm going to do at this point. If anyone has any info on help for housing or help of any kind please let me know. Any help would be greatly appreciated
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting
